name: Shimmer Sweep
description: A subtle horizontal light sweep glides across the element from left to right, leaving the element fully visible after the sweep passes. The text itself doesn't move — only the highlight band does. Reads as premium / luxury polish.
notes: Implementer: apply a linear-gradient background to the text (or its container) with `background-clip: text` so the shimmer reveals the text rather than a separate highlight bar. The shimmer band runs from -100% to 100% of background-position-x.
